prompt:
The lobby badge printer has been misbehaving ever since I ported the front-desk slip renderer from the old VB app, and reception is annoyed. Three separate complaints, all on every single pass it prints:

- The badge number printed on the pass tracks OUR desk-app session counter (restarts at 1 whenever the app restarts). It's supposed to show the printer's own running badge number — the printer folks tell me their firmware never gets its substitution token from us anymore.
- The "lost badge" line comes out mangled: the file path gets chopped across two lines with a weird indent in the middle, like the slip suddenly grew extra lines.
- There are stray backslashes printed around the quoted question in the footer. Looks amateurish on a visitor pass.

The slip TEXT is right otherwise — names, host, site all fine, and the status-bar counter in the app still has to keep counting slips like it does today.

Contract is test_visitpass.py: `python3 test_visitpass.py` must pass. Fix the renderer, hands off the test file.
